documents.title: GDPR Article 5: Data minimization
documents.content: Data processing should be adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary.

documents.title: UN Universal Declaration of Human Rights, Article 12
documents.content: No one shall be subjected to arbitrary interference with privacy.

documents.title: Linux eBPF LSM overview
documents.content: LSM hooks can enforce MAC style rules and provide runtime auditing.

documents.title: Sigstore Rekor transparency basics
documents.content: Transparency logs provide tamper-evident records for software signatures.
